content.en:
With Ye Tian's various ultimate talents, plus he can analyze the ultimate rules of comprehension with the help of many treasures that improve his comprehension and analyze all things.

There is also the ultimate ancient monument as a reference, and it is not difficult to comprehend the ultimate rules of the sea of dimensions.

However, he is not in a hurry, his current strength is extremely strong, and he has far surpassed the True Wu Realm Lord and the Ancient Ape True Monarch.

As the Yuanxing system continued to improve, his body became stronger and stronger, and even he didn't know how strong he had reached.

Of course, there was still too much distance between him and the strength of the Ultimate Realm Lord, just like the difference between clouds and mud, it was not a level at all.

Moreover, there are definitely many Ultimate Realm Masters of the Sea of Dimensions.

In the multidimensional territory alone, the Void Heaven Palace had three Ultimate Realm Masters, and each of the other eight Ultimate Forces had at least three Ultimate Realm Masters.

In other words, there are dozens of Ultimate Realm Masters in multidimensional territories, so how many Ultimate Realm Masters there are in the entire Dimensional Sea, countless Dimensional Heaven and Earth, is definitely a terrifying number.

It's just that these Ultimate Realm Masters are not in the same circle as the Nine Realms at all, and the Nine Realms rarely see the Ultimate Realm Masters.

......

The main body of the abyss is here.

Ye Tian was trying to study the Extreme Rules of the Abyssal Star, but he had to admit that this was extremely difficult.

"The ultimate rules of the sea of dimensions are slightly easier to comprehend, it is those strong people who analyze and disperse the ultimate system of the sea of dimensions step by step, so that people can cultivate step by step, from ordinary rules to supreme dimensional rules, and then to the ultimate rules, so that it is ten times easier to comprehend the ultimate rules, and it is at least ten times more difficult to comprehend the ultimate rules directly from the abyssal star system!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Ye Tian was ready to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Dimensional Sea first, so he went all out to comprehend the Ultimate Ancient Monument.

At the same time, a group of powerhouses at the peak of the Nine Realms, such as the True Wu Realm Lord, are also participating in the Ultimate Ancient Monument, they belong to the Void Heaven Palace, and they are naturally qualified to come to the Enlightenment, but they need to spend a lot of contribution points.

However, they are already very satisfied with being able to spend tribute 07 to be able to come to the ultimate ancient monument.

Compared to Ye Tian, the True Wu Realm Lord's comprehension effect was very bad, and it was almost unrealistic to comprehend the ultimate rules in a short period of time.

Even if they have the Ultimate Ancient Monument, some of the strong among them may never be able to comprehend the Ultimate Rules, and perhaps only a few of them will be able to comprehend the Ultimate Rules in the end, and it will be a matter of infinite years.

"It's too difficult, I've been comprehending the Ultimate Ancient Monument for so long, and the Supreme Dimensional Rules have improved a little, and the progress is also very slow, according to this efficiency, it's impossible for me to comprehend the Ultimate Rules!" A powerhouse who had mastered the six Ultimate Dimension Killing Moves at the peak of the Nine Realms shook his head and gave up his comprehension.

The main thing is that the contribution value spent is a bit much, and it is not cost-effective to continue to participate in enlightenment.

The True Wu Realm Lord has been contemplating enlightenment, he doesn't care about those contribution points, his supreme dimensional rules have long been comprehended to the three hundred and sixty-five realms, and he only thinks about comprehending the ultimate rules.

No matter how much contribution value is spent, he must understand the ultimate rule.

In this way, before I knew it, a long time had passed.

this day.

In front of the ultimate ancient monument.

The supreme dimensional rules on Ye Tian's body are changing, and they are changing like a qualitative change.

Countless supreme dimensional rules permeated the surroundings, gradually began to compress and change, and a terrifying aura permeated out, devouring all the supreme dimensional rules one by one, and finally turned into a wisp of rules.

The appearance of this wisp of rules seems to be able to suppress everything.

"That's ......"

The True Wu Realm Lord showed a look of envy and shock.

The ultimate rule!

This is the ultimate rule that belongs to the sea of dimensions, and Ye Tian actually comprehended it.

Why?

The True Wu Realm Lord was extremely jealous, he had already broken through to the three hundred and sixty-five Supreme Dimensional Rule Realm, Ye Tian had reached it later.

Everyone is contemplating the Ultimate Ancient Monument together, why did Ye Tian comprehend the Ultimate Rule first, but he didn't have any signs of comprehension?

"Could it be that it's really a talent gap?, what kind of demonic talent is the Ye Tian Realm Lord?" said the True Wu Realm Lord secretly.

In the past, he was the most powerful Nine Realms in the Void Heaven Palace, but as a result, Ye Tian surpassed him in a short period of time, he was very unconvinced, but he had to admit that he was far from being Ye Tian's opponent.

"Maybe Ye Tian has the hope of catching up with the Shi Yu Realm Lord!"

The Lord of the True Wu Realm said secretly.

The Shi Yu Realm Lord is one of the ultimate forces in the multidimensional territory, the peak existence of the Nine Realms of the Taiji Palace, and it is also the most powerful existence under the ultimate realm lord of the multidimensional territory, and he has comprehended the ultimate rules countless years ago, but he has not been able to impact the ultimate realm master.

Moreover, the Stone Feather Realm Lord has been roaming the Sea of Dimensions, so ordinary Nine Realms peaks can't see this Stone Feather Realm Lord at all.

The True Wu Realm Lord didn't know how powerful the current Shi Yu Realm Lord was, but the Shi Yu Realm Lord used to be able to kill him in one move, but now it will only be stronger.

......

"It's done, I finally understand the ultimate rules of the Dimensional Sea!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Now he felt that his body had broken some kind of shackles in an instant, which was the limit of the ultimate body.

"The ultimate body of the transcendent realm system has been elevated to the realm of Dacheng, as long as the ultimate rules continue to improve, the ultimate body will gradually ascend to the realm of perfection. "

The perfection of the ultimate body is a condition for attacking the ultimate realm master.

Basically, when the Supreme Dimensional Rules reach the three hundred and sixty-five levels, the Ultimate Body will be elevated to the Xiaocheng realm, and once the Ultimate Rules are comprehended, the Ultimate Body will reach the Dacheng realm.

However, the transcendental realm system is relatively mediocre, even if it is the ultimate body of the Dacheng realm, it is not as good as the ultimate body of the entry of the Yuanxing system.

This is the focus of the ultimate system, the ultimate system of the extradimensional realm is mediocre, but the difficulty of becoming the master of the ultimate realm is low, and there are many places.

The Abyssal Star System is powerful, but it is too difficult to become the Ultimate Realm Master.

Ye Tian was now majoring in the Transcendent Dimensional Realm Ultimate System and the Yuanxing Ultimate System, and as for the other Ultimate Systems, he had given up for the time being.

For example, the Divine Dimension Ultimate System and the Secret Domain Ultimate System, both of which are relatively incomplete, and he has to study them slowly, and he doesn't have that kung fu.

......

After comprehending the Ultimate Rule, the Ultimate Ancient Tablet was much less helpful to Ye Tian, he could indeed continue to comprehend the Ultimate Ancient Tablet, but if he wanted to comprehend the first Ultimate Rule to the second Ultimate Rule, it would take even longer years.

Comprehending the ultimate rules of the transcendental realm system, coupled with his ultimate talent, it is not difficult for him to create the ultimate dimensional killing move of the multidimensional realm.

After that, he began to create the ultimate dimensional killing moves that belonged to the multidimensional territory.

He knew very well that the power of different ultimate-dimensional killing moves was different.

For example, the Ultimate Dimension Killing Move of the Abyssal Star System, now that his Abyss System realm is very high, the power of the Ultimate Dimensional Killing Move of the Abyss Star System is very powerful.

On the other hand, the effect of such an ultimate dimensional killing move as the Trick Annihilation is average, because he has not studied it deeply in the Trick Domain system.

He is now majoring in the Transcendent Dimensional Realm Ultimate System and the Abyss Star Ultimate System, so only by creating more Ultimate Dimensional Killing Moves of these two Ultimate Systems, will his strength become even stronger.

Eighteenth dimension.

Ye Tianzheng is here to comprehend the multi-dimensional stars, and then observe the origin of the entire multi-dimensional territory from the perspective of the eighteenth dimension.

Time passed slowly, and his perception of the extradimensional realm system became deeper and deeper.

Finally this day.

He created the ultimate dimensional killing move that belongs to the ultimate system of the extradimensional realm - Star Kill!

The ultimate dimensional killing move formed by the power of many multi-dimensional stars, combined with the ultimate rules, the power that erupted was extremely terrifying.

......

"The Terran has been very good during this time, thirteen Ultimate Powerhouses have been born, and the number of powerhouses in the eighteenth dimension of the Abyss Star System has also increased, and almost all of the descendants of the Terran Extradimensional Realm have given birth to the true Abyssal Talent, if they grow up in the future, the strength of the Terran will be strengthened again!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Ye Tian was very satisfied with the development of the Terran Race, except for the nine ultimate forces, the strength of the Terran was now above the other forces.

Another long time has passed.

This side of the main body of the abyssal star.

The Abyss Star System is already equivalent to the realm of the Three Hundred and Sixty-Five Supreme Rules, and it is only one step away from being able to ascend to the Abyssal Star Ultimate Body Dacheng Realm.

At this time, the Abyssal Star Ultimate Body was many times more powerful than the Extreme Body of the Transcendent Dimensional Realm Ultimate System of the Dacheng Realm.

The giant axe in the distance was also extremely surprised to see Ye Tian's Yuanxing system break through again.

"This little guy is really a demon, let him improve the Yuanxing system, but he will really understand the ultimate rules of the Yuanxing!"

The Great Axe Extreme Venerable muttered.

If you comprehend the Ultimate Rule of the Abyss Star, then this Ultimate System is equivalent to being completely perfected, and the subsequent step is to strengthen the Ultimate Rules, and then use the Abyss System to impact the main realm of the Ultimate Realm.

Wow!

The Giant Axe Extreme Venerable came to Ye Tian's side, which made Ye Tian startled.

"I've seen my seniors!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Little guy, don't be afraid, I don't, my name is Giant Axe Jizun, I have something to discuss with you. Greataxe Extreme Venerable smiled.

It seems that the Giant Axe Extreme Venerable is very kind, but Ye Tian doesn't really think that the Giant Axe Extreme Venerable is easy to speak.

Every existence that can break through to the ultimate realm master is not a simple person, and must be careful.

Neither can offend the other party, nor can you easily believe the other party's words, otherwise you will be killed and you will not know it.

"Senior, please say!" Ye Tiandao.

"You are cultivating the Yuanxing system, it seems that it should not be far from being completely perfected, I also have research on the Yuanxing system, after all, I have been here to comprehend the main body of the Yuanxing for countless years, why don't we exchange insights with each other?" said the Giant Axe Jizun.

Exchange of feelings?

Ye Tian was stunned in his heart, could this be his own perception of the Abyss Star System, if this was really given to the other party like this, if the other party broke through to the Ultimate Realm Master Level on the path of the Abyss Star System, then wouldn't he be able to break through?

"Senior, my perception is nothing. Ye Tian said modestly, but the meaning of rejection was easy to feel.

But the giant axe Jizun pretended to be stupid, and still smiled: "Little guy, it's okay if you don't feel much, let's exchange feelings with each other, at least you can go further by 700!"

Seeing that the Giant Axe Extreme Venerable was pretending to be stupid, Ye Tian could only confess: "The Giant Axe Extreme Venerable's senior, except for the Transcendent Realm Realm, which is the Dimensional Sea Mass System, the other Ultimate Systems can only allow one person to break through to the Ultimate Realm Master, I want to focus on the Yuanxing System, the predecessor is already the Ultimate Realm Master, why bother to snatch this place with me!"

"Ahem, cough, ahem!!!" The Giant Axe Extreme Venerable said embarrassedly: "Little guy, you misunderstood, I really have given up this place, but I still want to raise the ultimate body of Yuanxing to the Dacheng realm." You should know very well that the physical body of the Transcendent Realm Ultimate System is very weak, although it is not the weakest, but it is far inferior to the Yuanxing System. I am the Ultimate Realm Lord who broke through to the Extreme Realm of the Transcendent Dimensional Realm, and now the strength of my physical body is comparable to the Perfection Realm of the Abyss Star System, if I raise the Ultimate Body of the Abyss Realm to the Dacheng Realm, I can probably increase my combat power by one percent!"

"Yicheng's combat power is already very good, but when it comes to the Ultimate Realm Lord level, every point is extremely difficult. Besides, your attainments in the Abyss System are very high, and your comprehension is also very high, even if we exchange perceptions with each other, it is impossible for me to break through to become the ultimate realm master of the Abyss Star System one step ahead of you. "

However.

Even if the Giant Axe Extreme Venerable said this, Ye Tian was still not very happy.

At this moment, the Giant Axe Extreme Venerable put forward a condition: "In this way, if you agree, I can take you to see the ultimate creature of the Abyssal Star, the other party's ultimate body is already in the Perfection Realm, although it is not the Ultimate Realm Master, but the other party's bloodline is powerful, and its Perfection Realm Ultimate Body is extremely terrifying, ten times more terrifying than the normal Abyss Ultimate Body." In addition, it has also mastered the extremely advanced rules of the Abyssal Star, and its combat power is comparable to that of ordinary Ultimate Realm Lords, here in the Abyssal Star Body, with the help of the power of the Abyssal Star, none of our six Ultimate Realm Lords can join forces to kill it. If you can comprehend such an ultimate creature, you will definitely progress faster in the Abyssal Star System. "

At this moment, Ye Tian moved.

Then, the Great Axe Extreme Zun put forward another condition: "I'll also give you a drop of the ultimate creature's ultimate blood for you to study, how about it?"

Ye Tian no longer hesitated, and agreed directly, "Okay, Giant Axe Extreme Venerable Senior, I agree to exchange feelings." "

Then, Ye Tian and the Giant Axe Extreme Venerable both made an ultimate oath so that they would not pit each other.

However, Ye Tian began to share the perception and knowledge of the Yuanxing System with the Giant Axe Extreme Venerable.

After the exchange, the Giant Axe Extreme Venerable gained a lot, and Ye Tian only had a little gain, he didn't expect that the dignified Ultimate Realm Lord would be here to comprehend the main body of the Yuanxing, and the result was just this insight.
